title: Centos8 spack has 18 cases failed in verilator@4.210
body:
I meet a problem:./driver.pl has 18 cases failed in verilator@4.210.
### Steps to reproduce the issue

```console
[root@centos8 ~]# spack install -y -v --keep-stage --dont-restage --no-checksum --fail-fast verilotor@4.210
[root@centos8 ~]# spack cd verilator
[root@centos8 spack-src]# spack load verilator
[root@centos8 spack-src]# cd test_regress
[root@centos8 test_regress]#source ../../../spack-build-env.txt
[root@centos8 test_regress]#./driver.pl
……
==SUMMARY: Passed 1451  Failed 18  Skipped 114  Unsup 18  Time 82:44
======================================================================
vlt/t_xml_tag: ==================================================
        perl /home/spack/spack/opt/spack/linux-centos8-aarch64/gcc-8.4.1/verilator-4.210-shf2ud7omtd5xzekqo3yggujo5b53lgw/bin/verilator --prefix Vt_xml_tag --x-assign unique -cc -Mdir obj_vlt/t_xml_tag -OD --debug-check --comp-limit-members 10 --xml-only --clk clk  -f input.vc +define+TEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_xml_tag t/t_xml_tag.v    > obj_vlt/t_xml_tag/vlt_compile.log
vlt/t_xml_tag: Self PASSED
==SUMMARY: Passed 1452  Failed 18  Skipped 114  Unsup 18  Time 82:44
==SUMMARY: Passed 1452  Failed 18  Skipped 114  Unsup 18  Time 82:44

======================================================================
        #dist/t_dist_manifest: %Error: Files mismatch with manifest: removed_la_files.txt test_regress/CMakeCache.txt test_regress/CMakeFiles/cmake.check_cache
                make && test_regress/t/t_dist_manifest.pl  --dist
        #vlt/t_a1_first_cc: %Error: Exec of perl failed:
                make && test_regress/t/t_a1_first_cc.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_ccache_report: %Error: Exec of sed failed:
                make && test_regress/t/t_ccache_report.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_debug_fatalsrc_bt_bad: %Error: Miscompares in output from perl
                make && test_regress/t/t_debug_fatalsrc_bt_bad.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_debug_sigsegv_bt_bad: %Error: Miscompares in output from perl
                make && test_regress/t/t_debug_sigsegv_bt_bad.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_flag_f: %Error: Exec of perl failed: %Error: Cannot open -f command file: /home/spack/spack/opt/spack/linux-centos8-aarch64/gcc-8.4.1/verilator-4.210-shf2ud7omtd5xzekqo3yggujo5b53lgw/test_regress/t/t_flag_f__2.vc
                make && test_regress/t/t_flag_f.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_hier_block_prot_lib: %Error: Exec of perl failed: make: Entering directory '/tmp/root/spack-stage/spack-stage-verilator-4.210-shf2ud7omtd5xzekqo3yggujo5b53lgw/spack-src/test_regress/obj_vlt/t_hier_block_prot_lib/secret'
                make && test_regress/t/t_hier_block_prot_lib.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_hier_block_prot_lib_shared: %Error: Exec of perl failed: make: Entering directory '/tmp/root/spack-stage/spack-stage-verilator-4.210-shf2ud7omtd5xzekqo3yggujo5b53lgw/spack-src/test_regress/obj_vlt/t_hier_block_prot_lib_shared/secret'
                make && test_regress/t/t_hier_block_prot_lib_shared.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_savable_open_bad2: %Error: Exec of obj_vlt/t_savable_open_bad2/Vt_savable_open_bad2 failed: %Error: /tmp/root/spack-stage/spack-stage-verilator-4.210-shf2ud7omtd5xzekqo3yggujo5b53lgw/spack-src/test_regress/t/t_savable_open_bad2.cpp:31: GOT = 1   EXP = 0
                make && test_regress/t/t_savable_open_bad2.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_10ms10ns: %Error: Missing ok
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_10ms10ns.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_1fs1fs: %Error: Missing ok
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_1fs1fs.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_1ms10ns: %Error: Missing ok
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_1ms10ns.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_1ns1ns: %Error: Missing ok
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_1ns1ns.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_1ps1fs: %Error: Missing ok
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_1ps1fs.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_time_vpi_1us1ns: %Error: Missing ok
                make && test_regress/t/t_time_vpi_1us1ns.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_wrapper_legacy: %Error: Exec of obj_vlt/t_wrapper_legacy/Vt_wrapper_legacy failed: -V{t0,1}- Verilated::debug is on. Message prefix indicates {<thread>,<sequence_number>}.
                make && test_regress/t/t_wrapper_legacy.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_wrapper_legacy_time64: %Error: Exec of obj_vlt/t_wrapper_legacy_time64/Vt_wrapper_legacy_time64 failed: -V{t0,1}- Verilated::debug is on. Message prefix indicates {<thread>,<sequence_number>}.
                make && test_regress/t/t_wrapper_legacy_time64.pl  --vlt
        #vlt/t_wrapper_legacy_timed: %Error: Exec of obj_vlt/t_wrapper_legacy_timed/Vt_wrapper_legacy_timed failed: -V{t0,1}- Verilated::debug is on. Message prefix indicates {<thread>,<sequence_number>}.
                make && test_regress/t/t_wrapper_legacy_timed.pl  --vlt
```
Can you help me look at it?
### Information on your system
[root@centos8 ~]# spack debug report
* **Spack:** 0.16.1-1624-a0b5dcca3c
* **Python:** 3.6.8
* **Platform:** linux-centos8-aarch64
* **Concretizer:** original
